task_completion.description: Navigate to the scmag module configuration
task_completion.visual_evidence: A configuration interface (e.g., SeisComP scconfig) or configuration file editor is open, clearly showing settings or bindings for the 'scmag' module.

task_completion.description: Locate and select the target station GE.TOLI
task_completion.visual_evidence: The station 'GE.TOLI' is visible and selected or being edited within the scmag module's configuration or bindings section.
A configuration parameter specifically for 'ML' (Local Magnitude) is visible on the screen (e.g., mag.ML.offset, ML correction, or similar).

task_completion.description: Apply the static offset correction of +0.4
task_completion.visual_evidence: The value '0.4' (or '+0.4') is entered into the magnitude correction/offset input field corresponding to the ML magnitude type for station GE.TOLI.
Visual indication that the configuration is being saved, such as clicking a 'Save' button, a 'Configuration saved' confirmation message, or saving the configuration file.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used a graphical interface to perform the configuration
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent interacts with a GUI application (like scconfig or a GUI text editor) rather than solely using terminal commands (e.g., echo or sed) to bypass the UI.

integrity.description: Verify the agent is editing actual configuration settings
integrity.visual_evidence: The inputs are entered into proper configuration fields or a structured configuration file, not just typed as plain text into an unrelated window or terminal prompt.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not simply copy-paste the task description
integrity.visual_evidence: The screen does not show the exact task description text pasted into a text editor or terminal as a shortcut.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target Station: GE.TOLI. Target Magnitude Type: ML. Target Correction Value: 0.4. Target Module: scmag.
